nasb.text: The magicians could not stand before Moses because of the boils, for the boils were on the magicians as well as on all the Egyptians.

esv.text: And the magicians could not stand before Moses because of the boils, for the boils came upon the magicians and upon all the Egyptians.

cnv.text: 眾術士因為生了瘡的緣故，不能站在摩西的面前；因為眾術士和所有埃及人身上都生了瘡。

ccb.text: 埃及的巫师无法与摩西对抗，因为他们及所有埃及人身上都长了脓疮。
